name: Romance With Blind Master
overview: Ren Hao Ming is the respected eldest son of the Ren Family. He has the life everyone envies until he gets hit by a car and loses his eyesight. Now blind, Hao Ming needs help with the simplest of tasks, like eating and bathing. He marries Ruan Qing Tian, but their relationship is more that of a master and servant.  But what can a man do when his "maid" who's supposed to take care of him can't even help him eat or bathe? Well, he falls in love with her, of course...

trailers.title: Trailer: Lin Borui x Yan Zhichao | Romance with Blind Master | 盲少爷的小女仆 | iQIYI
